summary: Iteration 10: Verified date-bug fix, /api/feedback endpoint, RL learned_routes in /api/stats, and frontend feedback UI + Settings Performance panel. 9/9 backend tests pass; frontend flow works with 0 console/page errors.
critical_code_review_comments: test_feedback_rl.py originally too strict on role literal — real backend now returns 'coding (learned)' when RL exploit picks the learned model. Not a bug; test fixed to substring match.

verified_behaviors.date_bug_fix: POST /api/chat/stream with 'What is today's date?' returned a real date containing '2026' and no refusal phrases; done event includes message_id.
verified_behaviors.learned_routes: /api/stats returns total_runs=161, by_model with runs/avg_confidence/repairs/up/down per model, and learned_routes populated (general chat, technical explanation, document Q&A, coding, reasoning, creative writing, summarisation, legal, factual/current-events).
verified_behaviors.up_reflected: After posting 'up' feedback, by_model[model].up increments by exactly 1.
verified_behaviors.regressions: Coding prompt (use_multi=false) completed via coding-capable model ('coding (learned)' role); 'hi' completed; use_multi=true ensemble completed with distinct drafter/critic/verifier/finalizer.
verified_behaviors.frontend: feedback-controls appear on assistant reply; feedback-up click applies emerald highlight (bg-emerald-100 border-emerald-400) and triggers success toast; Settings > Performance tab shows learned-routes panel; 0 page errors, 0 console errors.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file /app/backend/tests/test_feedback_rl.py is the canonical RL/feedback/date suite. Ollama is rate-limited; run backend tests with xdist workers=2 (default). Ensemble test uses 200s timeout.
